---
title: "Analysis of exp2"
author: "wusiyu"
date: "2026-03-16"
output: html_document
---

# 环境与R包配置
```{r}
# 配置环境
# rm(list = ls())   # 清除当前工作环境中所有对象（变量、函数等）

# if (.Platform$OS.type == 'windows') {
#         Sys.setlocale(category = 'LC_ALL','en_US.UTF-8')   # 使用UTF-8编码
# } 

# 安装cmdstanr作为后端
if (!require(cmdstanr)){
        install.packages("cmdstanr", repos = c('https://stan-dev.r-universe.dev', getOption("repos")))
        library(cmdstanr)
}

# set_cmdstan_path('C:/Users/HW/.cmdstan/cmdstan-2.36.0')   # 设置cmdstan路径：填写包的安装位置所在路径

# setwd("C:/1_Postgraduate/2_Lab/1_My_JC_Reports/2_methods/Tmp_BHM")   # 设置工作目录，自定义
curDir = getwd()   # 获取当前工作路径
curDir
set.seed(42)   # 随机种子，确保结果可复现
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache.extra = knitr::rand_seed)# 设置缓存，若随机数未变化则不重复运行已运行的代码块


# 配置R包
if (!require(pacman)){
        install.packages("pacman")
        library(pacman)
}

pacman::p_load(
  "rstan",
  "tidyverse",  # 数据处理
  "ggplot2", # 数据可视化
  "brms", # 贝叶斯建模
  "bayesplot",  # 贝叶斯绘图
  "bridgesampling",   # 计算贝叶斯因子
  "papaja"   # 论文格式
)
```

# 数据预处理
```{r data_preprocess}
# load in function
# source(here::here("SPE_analysis", "Code", "Functions", "Function_run_lmer.R"))
# 改为相对路径
source("Functions/Function_run_lmer.R")

# set paths
# dataPath = here::here("SPE_analysis/Data/exp1a/CleanData/")
# resultDir = here::here("SPE_analysis/Data/exp1a/CleanData/")
# 改为相对路径
dataPath <- "../../3_Data/3_2_exp2/CleanData/"

# load in data
data_all <- read.csv(file = file.path(dataPath, "data_all.csv")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    # R默认将因子第一个水平编码为0，其余为1，生成哑变量编码矩阵
    association = factor(association, levels = c("self", "other")),
    matchness = factor(isMatch, levels = c("match", "mismatch"))
)

# data_all$task_type <- factor(data_all$task_type)
# data_all$task_type <- relevel(data_all$task_type, ref = "relevant")

data_match <- data_all %>%
    dplyr::filter(part %in% c("match_RDK"))
# 输出到新的CSV文件
output_file <- base::file.path(dataPath, "data_match.csv")
utils::write.csv(data_match, output_file, row.names = FALSE)

data_rdk <- data_all %>%
    dplyr::filter(part %in% c("RDK_color","RDK_motion"))
# 输出到新的CSV文件
output_file <- base::file.path(dataPath, "data_rdk.csv")
utils::write.csv(data_rdk, output_file, row.names = FALSE)
```

# 1 检验匹配任务中的SPE

## 1.1 RT
### 1. 模型拟合
```{r warning=FALSE}
data_match$rt <- data_match$rt * 1000
m1_match_rt <- data_match %>%
  dplyr::filter(correct == 1) %>%
  brms::brm(
    rt ~ association*matchness*difficulty*group + (1 + association*matchness*difficulty|subj_idx),
    data = .,  # 模型设定随实验设计变化
    family=lognormal(),
    chains = 4,   
    warmup = 500,  
    iter = 2000,  
    thin = 1, 
    control = list(adapt_delta = .95),   # 用于减少采样发散
    cores = parallel::detectCores(),   # 使用所有可用核心
    backend = 'cmdstanr',   # rstan（默认）；cmdstanr：基于 Stan 的现代 C++ 实现
    save_pars = save_pars(all = TRUE),
    file = file.path(curDir, "glmmModels/m1_match_rt")   # 缓存模型
)
```

### 2. 模型评估
```{r}
summary(m1_match_rt)
```

```{r traceplot}
mcmc_trace(m1_match_rt, pars = c("b_Intercept", "b_associationother", "b_matchnessmismatch","b_associationother:matchnessmismatch", "sigma"))
```

### 3. 后验预测
```{r}
pp_check(m1_match_rt, type = "stat_grouped", group = "association")
```

### 4. 统计推断

```{r}
# 固定效应，各个条件下反应时分布
df_match_rt_pop <- m1_match_rt %>%
  tidybayes::gather_draws(`b_.*`, regex = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::rename(term = .variable,
                pop_mean = .value) %>%  # gather_draws会将变量存储为1列，所有的值存储为另一列
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(term = gsub("b_", "", term))%>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = c(term), values_from = pop_mean) %>%   # long to wide
  # 计算各条件反应时分布
  dplyr::mutate(
    self_match = Intercept,   #  self和match作为基线              
    other_match = Intercept  + associationother,
    self_mismatch = Intercept  + matchnessmismatch,
    other_mismatch = Intercept + associationother + matchnessmismatch + `associationother:matchnessmismatch`
    )%>%
  dplyr::select(`.chain`, `.iteration`, `.draw`,
                self_match, other_match,
                self_mismatch, other_mismatch) %>%
  # wide to long
  tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = self_match:other_mismatch, names_to = "term", values_to =  "value") %>%  
  dplyr::mutate(term = factor(term, levels = c(
                'self_match', 'other_match', 
                'self_mismatch', 'other_mismatch'
  )),
  # log还原
  value = exp(value))
  # value = value *1000)

df_match_rt_pop
```


```{r}
# 固定效应，条件间差异分布
df_match_rt_pop_diff_wide <- df_match_rt_pop %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = c(term), values_from = value) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    diff_os_match = other_match - self_match,
    diff_os_mismatch = other_mismatch - self_mismatch
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(`.chain`, `.iteration`, `.draw`,
    diff_os_match, diff_os_mismatch)

df_match_rt_pop_diff_wide
```

```{r}
# 固定效应，后验分布描述
df_match_rt_fixed <- df_match_rt_pop%>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(.,
                     id_cols = c('.chain', '.iteration', '.draw'),
                     names_from = term ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c('.chain', '.iteration', '.draw')) %>%
  bayestestR::describe_posterior(.,
                                 ci = 0.95,
                                 ci_method = 'hdi',
                                 test = c("p_direction", "p_significance"),
                                 centrality = "median") %>%
  tidyr::separate(Parameter, c('association', 'matchness')) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(association = factor(association, levels = c('self', 'other')),
                matchness = factor(matchness, levels = c('match', 'mismatch')))

summary(df_match_rt_fixed)
```


```{r}
# 基于sexit框架进行统计推断（改）
bayestestR::sexit(df_match_rt_pop_diff_wide[,c(4:5)])
```


### 5. 结果可视化

```{r}
# p1：绘制各个条件下反应时后验分布（固定效应）

## 固定效应均值
vlines <- df_match_rt_pop %>%
  tidyr::separate(term, c('association', 'matchness')) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(association = factor(association, levels = c('self', 'other'), labels = c("自我", "他人")),
                matchness = factor(matchness, levels = c('match', 'mismatch'), labels = c("匹配", "不匹配"))) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(association, matchness) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(Mean = mean(value))


## 各个条件RT后验分布
p_match_rt <- df_match_rt_pop %>%
  tidyr::separate(term, c('association', 'matchness')) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(association = factor(association, levels = c('self', 'other'), labels = c("自我", "他人")),
                matchness = factor(matchness, levels = c('match', 'mismatch'), labels = c("匹配", "不匹配"))) %>%
  ggplot2::ggplot(., aes(x = value, color = association)) +
  tidybayes::stat_halfeye(aes(fill = association), alpha = 0.6) +
  ggplot2::geom_vline(data = vlines,
             aes(xintercept = Mean, color = association),
             linetype = "dashed") +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap( ~ matchness, nrow = 2) +
  ggplot2::scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  ggplot2::labs(x = expression('反应时后验分布'),
                color = "关联类型",
                fill = "关联类型",
                )


# theme_apa()
p_match_rt

# ggsave(file.path(figDir, "motion_match_RT.png"))
```

```{r}
# p2：绘制各个条件反应时差异的后验分布（固定效应）

# 绘图数据
df_match_rt_pop_diff <- df_match_rt_pop_diff_wide %>%
  # wide to long
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = diff_os_match:diff_os_mismatch,
    names_to = "term_diff",
    values_to =  "value"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(term_diff = factor(
    term_diff,
    levels = c(
      'diff_os_match','diff_os_mismatch'),
    labels = c(
      "(RT[他人] - RT[自我])[匹配]",
      "(RT[他人] - RT[自我])[不匹配]"
    )
  ))


p_match_rt_diff <- df_match_rt_pop_diff %>%
  ggplot2::ggplot(aes(x = value, fill = after_stat(x > 0))) +   # RT：self快于friend/stranger,用RT长的-短的
  tidybayes::stat_halfeye() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") + # 添加x=0的垂线
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c('#E74C3C', '#2980B9'),# 蓝色出现在true组，红色出现在false组
    breaks = c(TRUE, FALSE),
    name = "反应时差异" ,
    labels = c(">0", "<0")# 标签yes表示x<0
  ) +
  xlab("反应时差异后验分布") +
 facet_wrap( ~ term_diff, nrow = 2, 
              labeller = labeller(term_diff = label_parsed))+
  papaja::theme_apa() +
  
  # ===================== 格式调整  =====================
  ggplot2::theme(
    # 1. 增大分面间距，避免标题和坐标轴重叠
    panel.spacing = ggplot2::unit(1.2, "cm"),  # 上下分面之间的间距
    plot.margin = ggplot2::unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "cm"),  # 整个图的外边距
    
    # 2. 调整坐标轴标题边距，避免和刻度/图例重叠
    axis.title.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 15)),
    axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 14),
    
    # 3. 调整分面标题边距，避免和上一个分面的坐标轴重叠
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 10, t = 10)),
    
    # 4. 调整图例位置和边距，避免和图重叠
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 14, margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 5)),
    legend.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 13),
    legend.box.margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 10)  # 图例和图之间的间距
  )

p_match_rt_diff


# ggsave(file.path(figDir, "motion_match_RT_diff.png"))
```
```{r}
# 不同难度下的SPE
ggplot2::ggplot(df_diff_match, ggplot2::aes(x = base::factor(difficulty), y = rt_diff_os)) +
  
  # 个体被试轨迹
  ggplot2::geom_line(ggplot2::aes(group = subj_idx), alpha = 0.25, color = "gray60", linewidth = 0.8) +
  
  # 群体均值线
  ggplot2::stat_summary(
    ggplot2::aes(group = 1), fun = mean, geom = "line",
    color = "#c0392b",linewidth = 1.8) +
  
  # 均值点
  ggplot2::stat_summary(
    ggplot2::aes(group = 1), fun = mean, geom = "point",
    color = "#c0392b", size = 3.5, shape = 19) +
  
  # y=0 虚线
  ggplot2::geom_hline(
    yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#2c3e50",
    linewidth = 0.8) +
  
  # 标签
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "RT", y = "SPE", x = "Difficulty") +  # 这里强制写上 x 轴标题
  
  #  X 轴显示
  # ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(
  #   limits = c("1", "2", "3", "4"), 
  #   labels = c("very easy", "easy", "difficult", "very difficult")
  # ) +
  
  # Y轴范围
  # ggplot2::ylim(-300, 550) +
  
  # 按 isMatch 分面
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~group, nrow = 1) +
  
  # APA 主题
  papaja::theme_apa(base_size = 18) +
  
  # 
  ggplot2::theme(
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 19, face = "bold"),  # 打开 X 轴标题
    axis.title.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 19, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 17, angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),  # 打开 X 轴文字
    axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 17),
    panel.grid = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.margin = ggplot2::unit(c(1,1,1,1), "cm"),
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.line = ggplot2::element_line(linewidth = 0.8)  # 强制显示轴线
  )
```


## 1.2 ACC
### 1. 模型拟合
```{r}
m2_match_acc <- data_match %>%
  # dplyr::mutate(correct = ifelse(correct == "true", 1, 0)) %>%
  brms::brm(
    correct ~ association*matchness*difficulty + (1 + association*matchness*difficulty|subj_idx),
    data = .,  # 模型设定随实验设计变化
    family = "bernoulli",
    chains = 4,   
    warmup = 500,  
    iter = 2000,  
    thin = 1, 
    control = list(adapt_delta = .95),   # 用于减少采样发散
    cores = parallel::detectCores(),   # 使用所有可用核心
    backend = 'cmdstanr',   # rstan（默认）；cmdstanr：基于 Stan 的现代 C++ 实现，速度更快且更稳定
    save_pars = save_pars(all = TRUE),
    file = file.path(curDir, "glmmModels/m2_match_acc")   # 缓存模型
)
```

### 2. 模型评估
```{r}
summary(m2_match_acc)
```


### 3. 后验预测
```{r}
pp_check(m2_match_acc, type = "stat_grouped", group = "association")
```


### 4. 统计推断

```{r}
# 固定效应，各个条件下反应时分布
df_match_acc_pop <- m2_match_acc %>%
  tidybayes::gather_draws(`b_.*`, regex = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::rename(term = .variable,
                pop_mean = .value) %>%  # gather_draws会将变量存储为1列，所有的值存储为另一列
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(term = gsub("b_", "", term))%>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = c(term), values_from = pop_mean) %>%   # long to wide
  # 计算各条件反应时分布
  dplyr::mutate(
    self_match = Intercept,   #  self和match作为基线              
    other_match = Intercept  + associationother,
    self_mismatch = Intercept  + matchnessmismatch,
    other_mismatch = Intercept + associationother + matchnessmismatch + `associationother:matchnessmismatch`
    )%>%
  dplyr::select(`.chain`, `.iteration`, `.draw`,
                self_match, other_match,
                self_mismatch, other_mismatch) %>%
  # wide to long
  tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = self_match:other_mismatch, names_to = "term", values_to =  "value") %>%  
  dplyr::mutate(term = factor(term, levels = c(
                'self_match', 'other_match', 
                'self_mismatch', 'other_mismatch'
  )))
  # log还原
  # value = exp(value),
  # value = value *1000)

df_match_acc_pop
```
```{r}
# 固定效应，条件间差异分布
df_match_acc_pop_diff_wide <- df_match_acc_pop %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = c(term), values_from = value) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    diff_so_match = self_match - other_match,
    diff_so_mismatch = self_mismatch - other_mismatch
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(`.chain`, `.iteration`, `.draw`,
    diff_so_match, diff_so_mismatch)

df_match_acc_pop_diff_wide
```

```{r}
# 固定效应，后验分布描述
df_match_acc_fixed <- df_match_acc_pop%>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(.,
                     id_cols = c('.chain', '.iteration', '.draw'),
                     names_from = term ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c('.chain', '.iteration', '.draw')) %>%
  bayestestR::describe_posterior(.,
                                 ci = 0.95,
                                 ci_method = 'hdi',
                                 test = c("p_direction", "p_significance"),
                                 centrality = "median") %>%
  tidyr::separate(Parameter, c('association', 'matchness')) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(association = factor(association, levels = c('self', 'other')),
                matchness = factor(matchness, levels = c('match', 'mismatch')))

summary(df_match_acc_fixed)
```


```{r}
# 基于sexit框架进行统计推断（改）
bayestestR::sexit(df_match_acc_pop_diff_wide[,c(4:5)])
```

### 5. 结果可视化

```{r}
# p1：绘制各个条件下反应时后验分布（固定效应）

## 固定效应均值
vlines <- df_match_acc_pop %>%
  tidyr::separate(term, c('association', 'matchness')) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(association = factor(association, levels = c('self', 'other'), labels = c("自我", "他人")),
                matchness = factor(matchness, levels = c('match', 'mismatch'), labels = c("匹配", "不匹配"))) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(association, matchness) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(Mean = mean(value))


## 各个条件RT后验分布
p_match_acc <- df_match_acc_pop %>%
  tidyr::separate(term, c('association', 'matchness')) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(association = factor(association, levels = c('self', 'other'), labels = c("自我", "他人")),
                matchness = factor(matchness, levels = c('match', 'mismatch'), labels = c("匹配", "不匹配"))) %>%
  ggplot2::ggplot(., aes(x = value, color = association)) +
  tidybayes::stat_halfeye(aes(fill = association), alpha = 0.6) +
  ggplot2::geom_vline(data = vlines,
             aes(xintercept = Mean, color = association),
             linetype = "dashed") +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap( ~ matchness, nrow = 2) +
  ggplot2::scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  ggplot2::labs(x = expression('反应时后验分布'),
                color = "关联类型",
                fill = "关联类型",
                )


# theme_apa()
p_match_acc

# ggsave(file.path(figDir, "motion_match_acc.png"))
```

```{r}
# p2：绘制各个条件反应时差异的后验分布（固定效应）

# 绘图数据
df_match_acc_pop_diff <- df_match_acc_pop_diff_wide %>%
  # wide to long
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = diff_so_match:diff_so_mismatch,
    names_to = "term_diff",
    values_to =  "value"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(term_diff = factor(
    term_diff,
    levels = c(
      'diff_so_match','diff_so_mismatch'),
    labels = c(
      "(correct[自我] - correct[他人])[匹配]",
      "(correct[自我] - correct[他人])[不匹配]"
    )
  ))


p_match_acc_diff <- df_match_acc_pop_diff %>%
  ggplot2::ggplot(aes(x = value, fill = after_stat(x > 0))) +   # RT：self快于friend/stranger,用RT长的-短的
  tidybayes::stat_halfeye() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") + # 添加x=0的垂线
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c('#E74C3C', '#2980B9'),# 蓝色出现在true组，红色出现在false组
    breaks = c(TRUE, FALSE),
    name = "正确率差异" ,
    labels = c(">0", "<0")# 标签yes表示x<0
  ) +
  xlab("正确率差异后验分布") +
 facet_wrap( ~ term_diff, nrow = 2, 
              labeller = labeller(term_diff = label_parsed))+
  papaja::theme_apa() +
  
  # ===================== 格式调整  =====================
  ggplot2::theme(
    # 1. 增大分面间距，避免标题和坐标轴重叠
    panel.spacing = ggplot2::unit(1.2, "cm"),  # 上下分面之间的间距
    plot.margin = ggplot2::unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "cm"),  # 整个图的外边距
    
    # 2. 调整坐标轴标题边距，避免和刻度/图例重叠
    axis.title.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 15)),
    axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 14),
    
    # 3. 调整分面标题边距，避免和上一个分面的坐标轴重叠
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 10, t = 10)),
    
    # 4. 调整图例位置和边距，避免和图重叠
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 14, margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 5)),
    legend.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 13),
    legend.box.margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 10)  # 图例和图之间的间距
  )

p_match_acc_diff


# ggsave(file.path(figDir, "motion_match_acc_diff.png"))
```

```{r}
# 不同难度下的SPE
ggplot2::ggplot(df_diff_match, ggplot2::aes(x = base::factor(difficulty), y = acc_diff_so)) +
  
  # 个体被试轨迹
  ggplot2::geom_line(ggplot2::aes(group = subj_idx), alpha = 0.25, color = "gray60", linewidth = 0.8) +
  
  # 群体均值线
  ggplot2::stat_summary(
    ggplot2::aes(group = 1), fun = mean, geom = "line",
    color = "#c0392b",linewidth = 1.8) +
  
  # 均值点
  ggplot2::stat_summary(
    ggplot2::aes(group = 1), fun = mean, geom = "point",
    color = "#c0392b", size = 3.5, shape = 19) +
  
  # y=0 虚线
  ggplot2::geom_hline(
    yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#2c3e50",
    linewidth = 0.8) +
  
  # 标签
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "ACC", y = "SPE", x = "Difficulty") +  # 这里强制写上 x 轴标题
  
  #  X 轴显示
  # ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(
  #   limits = c("1", "2", "3", "4"), 
  #   labels = c("very easy", "easy", "difficult", "very difficult")
  # ) +
  
  
  # 按 isMatch 分面
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~isMatch, nrow = 1) +
  
  # APA 主题
  papaja::theme_apa(base_size = 18) +
  
  # 
  ggplot2::theme(
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 19, face = "bold"),  # 打开 X 轴标题
    axis.title.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 19, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 17, angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),  # 打开 X 轴文字
    axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 17),
    panel.grid = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.margin = ggplot2::unit(c(1,1,1,1), "cm"),
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.line = ggplot2::element_line(linewidth = 0.8)  # 强制显示轴线
  )
```


# 2 检验假设一（关联*任务）
## 2.1 RT
### 1. 模型拟合
```{r warning=FALSE}
data_rdk$rt <- data_rdk$rt * 1000
m3_rdk_rt <- data_rdk %>%
  dplyr::filter(correct == 1) %>%
  brms::brm(
    rt ~ association*task_type*difficulty + (1 + association*task_type*difficulty|subj_idx),
    data = .,  # 模型设定随实验设计变化
    family=lognormal(),
    chains = 4,   
    warmup = 500,  
    iter = 2000,  
    thin = 1, 
    control = list(adapt_delta = .95),   # 用于减少采样发散
    cores = parallel::detectCores(),   # 使用所有可用核心
    backend = 'cmdstanr',   # rstan（默认）；cmdstanr：基于 Stan 的现代 C++ 
    save_pars = save_pars(all = TRUE),
    file = file.path(curDir, "glmmModels/m3_rdk_rt")   # 缓存模型
)
```

### 2. 模型评估
```{r}
summary(m3_rdk_rt)
```

### 3. 后验预测
```{r}
pp_check(m3_rdk_rt, type = "dens_overlay")
```

### 4. 统计推断

```{r}
# 固定效应，各个条件下反应时分布
df_rdk_rt_pop <- m3_rdk_rt %>%
  tidybayes::gather_draws(`b_.*`, regex = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::rename(term = .variable,
                pop_mean = .value) %>%  # gather_draws会将变量存储为1列，所有的值存储为另一列
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(term = gsub("b_", "", term))%>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = c(term), values_from = pop_mean) %>%   # long to wide
  # 计算各条件反应时分布
  dplyr::mutate(
    self_irrelevant = Intercept,   #  self和match作为基线              
    other_irrelevant = Intercept  + associationother,
    self_relevant = Intercept  + task_typerelevant,
    other_relevant = Intercept + associationother + task_typerelevant + `associationother:task_typerelevant`
    )%>%
  dplyr::select(`.chain`, `.iteration`, `.draw`,
                self_irrelevant, other_irrelevant,
                self_relevant, other_relevant) %>%
  # wide to long
  tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = self_irrelevant:other_relevant, names_to = "term", values_to =  "value") %>%  
  dplyr::mutate(term = factor(term, levels = c(
                'self_irrelevant', 'other_irrelevant', 
                'self_relevant', 'other_relevant'
  )),
  # log还原
  value = exp(value))
  # value = value *1000)

df_rdk_rt_pop
```

```{r}
# 固定效应，条件间差异分布
df_rdk_rt_pop_diff_wide <- df_rdk_rt_pop %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = c(term), values_from = value) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    diff_os_irrelevant = other_irrelevant - self_irrelevant,
    diff_os_relevant = other_relevant - self_relevant
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(`.chain`, `.iteration`, `.draw`,
    diff_os_irrelevant, diff_os_relevant)

df_rdk_rt_pop_diff_wide
```

```{r}
# 固定效应，后验分布描述
df_rdk_rt_fixed <- df_rdk_rt_pop%>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(.,
                     id_cols = c('.chain', '.iteration', '.draw'),
                     names_from = term ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c('.chain', '.iteration', '.draw')) %>%
  bayestestR::describe_posterior(.,
                                 ci = 0.95,
                                 ci_method = 'hdi',
                                 test = c("p_direction", "p_significance"),
                                 centrality = "median") %>%
  tidyr::separate(Parameter, c('association', 'task_type')) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(association = factor(association, levels = c('self', 'other')),
                task_type = factor(task_type, levels = c('irrelevant', 'relevant')))

summary(df_rdk_rt_fixed)
```


```{r}
# 基于sexit框架进行统计推断（改）
bayestestR::sexit(df_rdk_rt_pop_diff_wide[,c(4:5)])
```

### 5. 结果可视化

```{r}
# p1：绘制各个条件下反应时后验分布（固定效应）

## 固定效应均值
vlines <- df_match_acc_pop %>%
  tidyr::separate(term, c('association', 'matchness')) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(association = factor(association, levels = c('self', 'other'), labels = c("自我", "他人")),
                matchness = factor(matchness, levels = c('match', 'mismatch'), labels = c("匹配", "不匹配"))) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(association, matchness) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(Mean = mean(value))


## 各个条件RT后验分布
p_match_acc <- df_match_acc_pop %>%
  tidyr::separate(term, c('association', 'matchness')) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(association = factor(association, levels = c('self', 'other'), labels = c("自我", "他人")),
                matchness = factor(matchness, levels = c('match', 'mismatch'), labels = c("匹配", "不匹配"))) %>%
  ggplot2::ggplot(., aes(x = value, color = association)) +
  tidybayes::stat_halfeye(aes(fill = association), alpha = 0.6) +
  ggplot2::geom_vline(data = vlines,
             aes(xintercept = Mean, color = association),
             linetype = "dashed") +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap( ~ matchness, nrow = 2) +
  ggplot2::scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  ggplot2::labs(x = expression('反应时后验分布'),
                color = "关联类型",
                fill = "关联类型",
                )


# theme_apa()
p_match_acc

# ggsave(file.path(figDir, "motion_match_acc.png"))
```

```{r}
# p2：绘制各个条件反应时差异的后验分布（固定效应）

# 绘图数据
df_rdk_rt_pop_diff <- df_rdk_rt_pop_diff_wide %>%
  # wide to long
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = diff_os_irrelevant:diff_os_relevant,
    names_to = "term_diff",
    values_to =  "value"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(term_diff = factor(
    term_diff,
    levels = c(
      'diff_os_relevant','diff_os_irrelevant'),
    labels = c(
      "(RT[他人] - RT[自我])[任务相关]",
      "(RT[他人] - RT[自我])[任务无关]"
    )
  ))


p_rdk_rt_diff <- df_rdk_rt_pop_diff %>%
  ggplot2::ggplot(aes(x = value, fill = after_stat(x > 0))) +   # RT：self快于friend/stranger,用RT长的-短的
  tidybayes::stat_halfeye() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") + # 添加x=0的垂线
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c('#E74C3C', '#2980B9'),# 蓝色出现在true组，红色出现在false组
    breaks = c(TRUE, FALSE),
    name = "反应时差异" ,
    labels = c(">0", "<0")# 标签yes表示x<0
  ) +
  xlab("反应时差异后验分布") +
 facet_wrap( ~ term_diff, nrow = 2, 
              labeller = labeller(term_diff = label_parsed))+
  papaja::theme_apa() +
  
  # ===================== 格式调整  =====================
  ggplot2::theme(
    # 1. 增大分面间距，避免标题和坐标轴重叠
    panel.spacing = ggplot2::unit(1.2, "cm"),  # 上下分面之间的间距
    plot.margin = ggplot2::unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "cm"),  # 整个图的外边距
    
    # 2. 调整坐标轴标题边距，避免和刻度/图例重叠
    axis.title.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 15)),
    axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 14),
    
    # 3. 调整分面标题边距，避免和上一个分面的坐标轴重叠
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 10, t = 10)),
    
    # 4. 调整图例位置和边距，避免和图重叠
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 14, margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 5)),
    legend.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 13),
    legend.box.margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 10)  # 图例和图之间的间距
  )

p_rdk_rt_diff

# ggsave(file.path(figDir, "motion_match_acc_diff.png"))
```


## 2.2 ACC
### 1. 模型拟合
```{r warning=FALSE}
# iter=1000,Total execution time: 852.2 seconds..18mins
m4_rdk_acc <- data_rdk %>%
  # dplyr::mutate(correct = ifelse(correct == "true", 1, 0)) %>%
  brms::brm(
    correct ~ association*task_type*difficulty + (1 + association*task_type*difficulty|subj_idx),
    data = .,  # 模型设定随实验设计变化
    family = "bernoulli",
    chains = 4,   
    warmup = 500,  
    iter = 2000,  
    thin = 1, 
    control = list(adapt_delta = .95),   # 用于减少采样发散
    cores = parallel::detectCores(),   # 使用所有可用核心
    backend = 'cmdstanr',   # rstan（默认）；cmdstanr：基于 Stan 的现代 C++ 
    save_pars = save_pars(all = TRUE),
    file = file.path(curDir, "glmmModels/m4_rdk_acc")   # 缓存模型
)
```

### 2. 模型评估
```{r}
summary(m4_rdk_acc)
```

### 3. 后验预测
```{r}
pp_check(m4_rdk_acc, type = "dens_overlay")
```

### 4. 统计推断

```{r}
# 固定效应，各个条件下反应时分布
df_rdk_acc_pop <- m4_rdk_acc %>%
  tidybayes::gather_draws(`b_.*`, regex = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::rename(term = .variable,
                pop_mean = .value) %>%  # gather_draws会将变量存储为1列，所有的值存储为另一列
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(term = gsub("b_", "", term))%>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = c(term), values_from = pop_mean) %>%   # long to wide
  # 计算各条件反应时分布
  dplyr::mutate(
    self_irrelevant = Intercept,   #  self和match作为基线              
    other_irrelevant = Intercept  + associationother,
    self_relevant = Intercept  + task_typerelevant,
    other_relevant = Intercept + associationother + task_typerelevant + `associationother:task_typerelevant`
    )%>%
  dplyr::select(`.chain`, `.iteration`, `.draw`,
                self_irrelevant, other_irrelevant,
                self_relevant, other_relevant) %>%
  # wide to long
  tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = self_irrelevant:other_relevant, names_to = "term", values_to =  "value") %>%  
  dplyr::mutate(term = factor(term, levels = c(
                'self_irrelevant', 'other_irrelevant', 
                'self_relevant', 'other_relevant'
  )))
  # log还原
  # value = exp(value))
  # value = value *1000)

df_rdk_acc_pop
```

```{r}
# 固定效应，条件间差异分布
df_rdk_acc_pop_diff_wide <- df_rdk_acc_pop %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = c(term), values_from = value) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    diff_so_irrelevant = self_irrelevant - other_irrelevant,
    diff_so_relevant = self_relevant - other_relevant
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(`.chain`, `.iteration`, `.draw`,
    diff_so_irrelevant, diff_so_relevant)

df_rdk_acc_pop_diff_wide
```

```{r}
# 固定效应，后验分布描述
df_rdk_acc_fixed <- df_rdk_acc_pop%>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(.,
                     id_cols = c('.chain', '.iteration', '.draw'),
                     names_from = term ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c('.chain', '.iteration', '.draw')) %>%
  bayestestR::describe_posterior(.,
                                 ci = 0.95,
                                 ci_method = 'hdi',
                                 test = c("p_direction", "p_significance"),
                                 centrality = "median") %>%
  tidyr::separate(Parameter, c('association', 'task_type')) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(association = factor(association, levels = c('self', 'other')),
                task_type = factor(task_type, levels = c('irrelevant', 'relevant')))

summary(df_rdk_acc_fixed)
```


```{r}
# 基于sexit框架进行统计推断（改）
bayestestR::sexit(df_rdk_acc_pop_diff_wide[,c(4:5)])
```

### 5. 结果可视化
```{r}
# p2：绘制各个条件反应时差异的后验分布（固定效应）

# 绘图数据
df_rdk_acc_pop_diff <- df_rdk_acc_pop_diff_wide %>%
  # wide to long
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = diff_so_irrelevant:diff_so_relevant,
    names_to = "term_diff",
    values_to =  "value"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(term_diff = factor(
    term_diff,
    levels = c(
      'diff_so_relevant','diff_so_irrelevant'),
    labels = c(
      "(correct[自我] - correct[他人])[任务相关]",
      "(correct[自我] - correct[他人])[任务无关]"
    )
  ))


p_rdk_acc_diff <- df_rdk_acc_pop_diff %>%
  ggplot2::ggplot(aes(x = value, fill = after_stat(x > 0))) +   # RT：self快于friend/stranger,用RT长的-短的
  tidybayes::stat_halfeye() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") + # 添加x=0的垂线
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c('#E74C3C', '#2980B9'),# 蓝色出现在true组，红色出现在false组
    breaks = c(TRUE, FALSE),
    name = "正确率差异" ,
    labels = c(">0", "<0")# 标签yes表示x<0
  ) +
  xlab("正确率差异后验分布") +
 facet_wrap( ~ term_diff, nrow = 2, 
              labeller = labeller(term_diff = label_parsed))+
  papaja::theme_apa() +
  
  # ===================== 格式调整  =====================
  ggplot2::theme(
    # 1. 增大分面间距，避免标题和坐标轴重叠
    panel.spacing = ggplot2::unit(1.2, "cm"),  # 上下分面之间的间距
    plot.margin = ggplot2::unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "cm"),  # 整个图的外边距
    
    # 2. 调整坐标轴标题边距，避免和刻度/图例重叠
    axis.title.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 15)),
    axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 14),
    
    # 3. 调整分面标题边距，避免和上一个分面的坐标轴重叠
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 10, t = 10)),
    
    # 4. 调整图例位置和边距，避免和图重叠
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 14, margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 5)),
    legend.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 13),
    legend.box.margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 10)  # 图例和图之间的间距
  )

p_rdk_acc_diff

# ggsave(file.path(figDir, "motion_match_acc_diff.png"))
```

# 3 检验假设三(难度的影响)

## 3.1 RT

### 1. 模型拟合
```{r warning=FALSE}
# 将难度编码为顺序变量，检查变化趋势
data_onlyirrel <- data_rdk %>%
    dplyr::filter(task_type %in% c("irrelevant"))

m5_difficulty_rt <- data_onlyirrel %>%
  brms::brm(
    rt ~ association*difficulty + (1 + association + difficulty|subj_idx),
    data = .,  # 模型设定随实验设计变化
    family=lognormal(),
    chains = 4,   
    warmup = 500,  
    iter = 2000,  
    thin = 1, 
    control = list(adapt_delta = .95),   # 用于减少采样发散
    cores = parallel::detectCores(),   # 使用所有可用核心
    backend = 'cmdstanr', 
    save_pars = save_pars(all = TRUE),
    # file = file.path(curDir, "glmmModels/m5_motion_match_rt")   # 缓存模型
)
```

### 2. 模型评估
```{r}
summary(m5_difficulty_rt)
```

### 3. 后验预测
```{r}
pp_check(m5_difficulty_rt, type = "dens_overlay")
```

### 4. 结果可视化
```{r}
# 1. 提取后验样本（brms包）
post <- brms::posterior_samples(m5_difficulty_rt)

# 2. 查看参数名
colnames(post)

# 3. 自动匹配交互项（dplyr管道）
interact_post <- post %>%
  dplyr::select(dplyr::contains("association") & dplyr::contains("difficulty")) %>%
  dplyr::pull(1)

# 4. 绘制交互作用后验分布图（ggplot2 + papaja APA主题）
ggplot2::ggplot(data.frame(effect = interact_post), ggplot2::aes(x = effect)) +
  ggplot2::geom_density(fill = "#2E86AB", alpha = 0.6, linewidth = 1) +
  ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "交互作用的后验分布") +
  papaja::theme_apa()
```

## 3.2 ACC

### 1. 模型拟合
```{r warning=FALSE}

m6_difficulty_acc <- data_onlyirrel %>%
  brms::brm(
    correct ~ association*difficulty + (1 + association + difficulty|subj_idx),
    data = .,  # 模型设定随实验设计变化
    family = brmsfamily("gaussian", link = "identity", link_sigma = "log"),
    chains = 4,   
    warmup = 500,  
    iter = 2000,  
    thin = 1, 
    control = list(adapt_delta = .95),   # 用于减少采样发散
    cores = parallel::detectCores(),   # 使用所有可用核心
    backend = 'cmdstanr',   # rstan（默认）；cmdstanr：基于 Stan 的现代 C++ 实现，速度更快且更稳定
    save_pars = save_pars(all = TRUE),
    # file = file.path(curDir, "glmmModels/m7_motion_rdk_rt")   # 缓存模型
)
```

### 2. 模型评估
```{r}
summary(m6_difficulty_acc)
```

### 3. 后验预测
```{r}
pp_check(m6_difficulty_acc, type = "dens_overlay")
```

### 4. 结果可视化
```{r}
# 1. 提取后验样本（brms包）
post <- brms::posterior_samples(m6_difficulty_acc)

# 2. 查看参数名
colnames(post)

# 3. 自动匹配交互项（dplyr管道）
interact_post <- post %>%
  dplyr::select(dplyr::contains("association") & dplyr::contains("difficulty")) %>%
  dplyr::pull(1)

# 4. 绘制交互作用后验分布图（ggplot2 + papaja APA主题）
ggplot2::ggplot(data.frame(effect = interact_post), ggplot2::aes(x = effect)) +
  ggplot2::geom_density(fill = "#2E86AB", alpha = 0.6, linewidth = 1) +
  ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "交互作用的后验分布") +
  papaja::theme_apa()
```
